calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools is Wednesday, August 13, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools runs Mar 9, 2026–Mar 13, 2026, 5 days.

yearNumbers.label: Earliest Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break begins March 9 — the earliest spring break window among North Carolina's major districts this year.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday (Apr 3) is a school holiday falling 3 weeks after Spring Break ends — a distinct standalone holiday, not attached to the break.

calendarNotes: Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 13, 2025 — about two weeks earlier than Charlotte-Mecklenburg and Guilford County (both August 25). Spring Break runs March 9–13, 2026. The school year ends May 27, 2026 — earlier than most North Carolina peers.
